name: feature.email.nodes
description: Email feature node pack (ADR 0014) — read/render nodes over the ctx.features.email surface. list-templates reads an org's templates; render interpolates a template for a contact ({{contact.*}}). The campaign send (fan-out + provider dispatch) is a deliberate follow-on, not a workflow node.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Email: List Templates
nodes.description: Lists an org's email templates over ctx.features.email. Tenant-guarded.

nodes.label: Email: Render
nodes.description: Renders a template's subject + body for a contact ({{contact.name|email|company}}) over ctx.features.email.
